general.title: User Capsule Finder
general.instructions: This admin tool searches for all capsules owned by specific users. Enter one or more user IDs and select your preferred output format.

parameters.name: User IDs
parameters.help_text: Enter comma-separated user IDs to search for (e.g., abc-123,def-456)

parameters.name: Output Format
parameters.help_text: Choose output format: JSON (single file) or CSV (capsules table)
